title: Vung Tau, Ba Ria-Vung Tau — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vung Tau, Ba Ria-Vung Tau: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vung Tau is a city in Ba Ria-Vung Tau with a population of 450,000. A coastal city near Ho Chi Minh City known for its beaches, oil industry, and as a weekend getaway destination, offering a more relaxed pace than the big city.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
